system.description:
Range 4 + (4 × Mana Dice spent). Choose one mode when you use it:

Tether Mode (Action): Pull a creature your size or smaller next to you. You may Restrain them. OR you move to a larger creature and gain Riding.

Coil Mode (2 Actions): Restrain all creatures fully in an area equal to the number of Mana Dice rolled (e.g. 2 dice = 2×2 area).

Upgrades (apply to both modes — toggle on the Rules tab when picked via Constant Tinkering):

  • Amplified Conduit. +2 Range.
  • Reinforced Tethers. +1 to Tethercoil save DC.

Mishap — Tether Mode (Mistether!): The GM may choose a different creature in Range.

Mishap — Coil Mode (Tangled!): You are Restrained as well.

Upgrades available (pick at level-up via Constant Tinkering)

  • Amplified Conduit
  • Reinforced Tethers
